# VindE Developer Ecosystem

> Interactive portal and technical index of VindE (alias VindEi), an independent systems architect and software engineer .
## Developer Profile

- **Primary Identity:** Systems utility architect and software engineer.
- **Main Technical Stack:** .NET, Flutter, and Vanilla Web (HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript).
- **Engineering Philosophy:** Dependency-minimalist, performance-first execution ,open source enthusiast 
- **Specializations:** applications, network, Web.

## Local Utilities (Client-Side Only)

- [Text Encryptor](https://vinde.me/data): Client-side AES-256-GCM crypto utility. Derives keys via PBKDF2 (200,000 iterations, SHA-256). Ciphertexts are encoded in URL hash fragments (#base64), guaranteeing zero server-side transmission.
- [What's My IP](https://vinde.me/echo): Real-time network telemetry client. Races multiple geolocator API endpoints (geojs.io, ipwho.is, freeipapi.com, ipapi.co) in parallel. Dynamically merges data gaps and renders location coordinates using Leaflet.js.

## Software Catalogue

- [SnapDNS](https://github.com/VindEi/SnapDNS): Cross-platform DNS Changer. Supports encrypted protocols (DoH/DoT), preset profiles, and latency diagnostics.
- [AutoClickIt](https://github.com/VindEi/AutoClickIt): High-frequency, background automation utility for Windows.
- [Cmd-HandyScripts](https://github.com/VindEi/Cmd-HandyScripts): Windows system maintenance scripts, and network repair utilities.
- [AuthMe](https://github.com/VindEi/AuthMe): Upcoming cross-platform 2FA Authenticator featuring local database encryption and secure cloud backups.
- [Project: Dodge](https://vinde.me/projects): Upcoming cross-platform indie game currently in active development.
- [Mineflow](https://vinde.me/projects): Upcoming 3D infinite runner merged with Minesweeper-style procedural grid logic (currently in development).

## Communication Nodes

- [GitHub](https://github.com/VindEi) Developer repositories and open-source packages.
- [Telegram](https://t.me/lordhimself) Direct contact line.
- [Twitter](https://twitter.com/V1ndEi) Public channel.
- [Email](mailto:inbox@vinde.me) inbox@vinde.me inbox terminal.
